job_description:
# Data Analyst - Remote
Company: UnitedHealth Group / Optum
Source: Official company careers page
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://careers.unitedhealthgroup.com/job/eden-prairie/data-analyst-remote/34088/94259827232

## Highlights
- Posted April 22, 2026; requisition 2329080.
- Business & Data Analytics role focused on structured data management, BI tools, pattern/trend analysis, normalization, data quality, dashboards, visualizations, decision aids, and strategic data solutions.
- Requires 5+ years as Business Analyst or Data Analyst, 3+ years with relational databases such as SQL/Oracle, 2+ years BI visualization, 1+ years Alteryx or SSIS, and intermediate SQL.
- Remote flexibility within the U.S.; Minneapolis or Washington, DC hires have an office requirement.
strengths: Strong fit with SQL, relational data, Power BI/Tableau, data quality, and data solution support.
Optum healthcare context maps to payer data and healthcare reporting validation.
SSIS is adjacent to current ETL toolset and can be presented truthfully.
gaps: Alteryx is not supported by the base resume.
Role is broader BI/data analyst rather than explicitly ETL validation.
notes: Apply if time after the senior UHG and Diverge roles. Tailor toward SQL, BI visualization, data quality, and healthcare analytics.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Data Analyst | Healthcare Analytics | SQL & BI Reporting

replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)
replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced pivots, lookups, Power Query), dashboard and reporting validation
